name: One Journey - Two Heritages: Spiritual Yen Tu to Majestic Halong Bay 6 days
duration: Places:Hanoi - Yen Tu Mountain - Halong Bay
highlights: Savor Michelin-selected street food in Hanoi and immerse yourself in the city’s vibrant culinary culture
Experience the spiritual heritage of Yen Tu with a rejuvenating wellness journey and sacred mountain exploration
Savor a majestic Royal Dinner, where imperial-inspired cuisine aesthetics create an unforgettable culinary experience
Cruise through Halong Bay and marvel at its timeless limestone wonders
Explore Hanoi’s iconic landmarks aboard the charming Five Gates’ Tourist Train before departure

itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival - Welcome Pick Up - Michelin-Selected Street Food Tour
itinerary.description:
Upon landing at Noi Bai International Airport, your friendly tour guide and driver will greet you and escort you to your hotel in Hanoi. Check in and take some time to relax and refresh after your journey, settling in for the start of your Vietnam adventure. Evening

In the evening, embark on a Michelin-selected street food tour, where you will taste some of Hanoi’s most iconic dishes (menu varies by season), such as aromatic Pho, flavorful Bun Cha, crispy Banh Cuon, and the famous Egg Coffee. Wander through lively alleyways, savoring authentic flavors while soaking in the vibrant local atmosp...

itinerary.title: Hanoi - Yen Tu: Heritage Journey - Wellness & Energy Renewal
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a leisurely breakfast, check out from your Hanoi hotel. At 08:30, your driver will pick you up for a scenic transfer to Legacy Yen Tu, where the journey into Vietnam’s rich cultural heritage begins. Around 11:00, arrive and receive a warm welcome in the lobby, where you will be introduced to the heritage stories of Yen Tu before checking in to your room and settling in. Savor a delightful lunch featuring Vietnamese royal-inspired cuisine, blending traditional flavors with modern refinement. Afternoon

Attend the Tinh Hoa Sac Mau Show, a vibrant performance that celebrates Vietna...

itinerary.title: Discover the Sacred Yen Tu Mountain
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a hearty breakfast at Tho Quang Restaurant, embark on the Heritage Tour to explore the sacred Yen Tu Mountain. Begin with a visit to Hoa Yen Pagoda, an iconic spiritual site nestled in the mountains. The group will ascend via cable car, enjoying panoramic views, and return by walking down along scenic trails. Recommended Attire & Footwear for Yen Tu Mountain:

Comfortable, sporty clothing is preferred. As temple visits are included, please wear clothes covering shoulders and knees (e.g., short-sleeved tops, long pants, or skirts below the knee)

itinerary.title: Yen Tu - Halong Bay Luxury Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description:
Morning

After a hearty breakfast at Tho Quang Restaurant, depart from Yen Tu for Halong Bay, enjoying the scenic drive along lush countryside and coastal landscapes. Upon arrival at Tuan Chau Marina, complete your check-in and embark on a luxury Halong Bay cruise, ready to explore one of the world’s most stunning seascapes with its thousands of limestone karsts and emerald waters. Savor a delicious onboard lunch as the cruise gently glides through the majestic bay, offering your first glimpses of its breathtaking natural beauty. Afternoon

Participate in optional activities kayaking through h...

itinerary.title: Halong Bay - Hanoi - Free Time to Unwind
itinerary.description:
Morning

Wake up to the tranquil beauty of Halong Bay, where emerald waters and towering limestone karsts create a breathtaking panorama. Begin your day with a delicious breakfast on board, accompanied by the gentle sway of the boat. Take a morning stroll on the deck to breathe in the fresh sea air, or join optional activities such as Tai Chi, perfect for starting the day with calm and energy. Depending on your cruise itinerary, visit some of the bay’s iconic attractions, including the Sung Sot (Surprise) Cave, the scenic Titop Island, or other hidden corners of this UNESCO World Heritage Site...

itinerary.title: Hanoi Five Gates Train - Departure
itinerary.description: Start your day with a leisurely breakfast at your hotel, savoring the last moments in Hanoi’s charming Old Quarter. At 07:30, gather in the hotel lobby where your tour guide will meet you for a scenic cultural experience. Board the Hanoi Five Gates Tourist Train at 08:00, a unique journey that winds through the city’s historical gates, allowing you to witness Hanoi’s rich architectural heritage and bustling streets. Admire centuries-old gates and local life unfolding along the route. The train tour concludes around 11:30, leaving you with plenty of time to reflect on the highlights of your jou...

included: Accommodation in TWN/ DBL sharing accommodation at hotel
All transport (including airport pick up & see off), as per itinerary
Meals as indicated in the program
All in-tour stationed local English speaking guide.
Entrance fees for Vietnam attractions, as per itinerary
Nuong Village tickets (Village Night Festival Show)
Yen Tu Mountain Trip – Hoa Yen – Giai Oan half day (Include: 01 Way Cable Car ticket)
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
